name: Steve Lawrence
abstract: Steve Lawrence (born Sidney Liebowitz; July 8, 1935 – March 7, 2024) was an American singer, comedian, and actor. He was best known as a member of the pop duo Steve and Eydie, with his wife Eydie Gormé.

about_quotes.speaker: Quincy Jones
about_quotes.evidence: Andy Williams was on “The Tonight Show.” Nobody knew who he was then. He’d left – followed Eydie Gormé and Steve Lawrence on “The Tonight Show.”
about_quotes.doc_title: Quincy Jones — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
